Description

URL - https://fes-int.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/risking
Page title -  Risking
Journey - 4, Step 5

image-20260325-175612.png
 

Summary
The heading structure on the Risking page does not correctly reflect the visual structure and hierarchy. The heading “Vessels of Interest” is currently coded as an <h4> nested under the <h3> heading “Manage risk rating use”. However, visually and semantically, “Vessels of Interest” introduces its own new section and should not be treated as a sub‑heading of the preceding <h3>.

This mismatch may confuse screen reader users who navigate by headings and expect programmatic structure to match the visual hierarchy.

Additional similar issues may be present elsewhere within the service and should be reviewed.

Problem Description
The “Vessels of Interest” heading is incorrectly marked as <h4>.

It visually represents a top‑level section within the page and should sit directly under the main page <h1>, making it an <h2>.

The mismatch between visual and programmatic hierarchy negatively impacts screen reader navigation.

Change
Update the “Vessels of Interest” heading to reflect the correct semantic level:

<h2>Vessels Of Interest</h2>

Ensure headings across the service maintain correct hierarchical relationships and match visual presentation.

Acceptance Criteria

“Vessels of Interest” is coded as an <h2> heading.
